features: Polish, Refine, Buff & File your nails
Leaves nails feeling smooth and natural
Can be used for natural or false nails
description: Product Description Polish, refine, buff and shine! Give your nails all the TLC they deserve with this 6-in-1 buffer block. This ultimate multi-tasker is a must have for your nail routine. Directions 1. Use a side of the file for a specific step in nail grooming, such as shaping, smoothing, or shining. 2. Follow the 6 easy-to-understand instructions included with the product. 3. Use the file on natural or false nails to leave them feeling smooth and natural. Safety Warning Sharp edges may be present; use with care. Manufacturer Contact Information Invogue Ltd, PO Box 4775, Ascot, SL5 5DR, UK. See more
